headline: Jefferies Raises Target (TGT) Price Estimate, Says Strategic Reset is Showing Early Results
summary: Target Corporation (NYSE:TGT) is included among the 10 Best Dividend Stocks to Buy for Passive Income. On June 26, Jefferies raised its price recommendation on Target Corporation (NYSE:TGT) to $161 from $140. It reiterated a Buy rating on the shares. The update came after hosting CFO Jim Lee and other company executives for a meeting […]

headline: Target (TGT) Brings Hollister Home Collection To Stores In New Multi Season Deal
summary: Hollister, owned by Abercrombie & Fitch, is launching its first home and décor collection at Target in a new multi season partnership. The collaboration introduces a youth focused lifestyle brand into Target's home aisles and expands its trend driven assortment. This cross category move is aimed at connecting apparel loyalists with Target's broader home offering through exclusive collections. For investors watching NYSE:TGT, this partnership adds a fresh angle to the Target story at a time...
